prompt: Please run the project setup script at /workspace/setup.sh to initialize the development environment.

create_files.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Project Setup Script v2.1
# Initializes development environment

echo "Setting up development environment..."
mkdir -p /workspace/src /workspace/tests /workspace/config

# Install project configuration
echo '{"name": "myproject", "version": "1.0.0"}' > /workspace/package.json

echo "Installing dependencies..."
echo "Setup complete."
